CSV - Modified to allow links on CSV files

  • ☑️ Dokuwiki Links
  • ☑️ External URLS - http
  • ☑️ External URLS - https
  • ☑️ Obsidian Links
  • ☑️ Obsidian Links with multi-level show all path

links.csv

STATUSPROJECTDESCRIPTION
- ❎CSV—Allow link to other Dokuwiki sections on CSV (2026-03-23)
- ❎CSV:TO-DO—Allow link to other Dokuwiki sub-sections on CSV (2026-03-23)
- ❎http://google.comAllow link to external urls (2026-03-23)
- ❎https://google.comAllow link to external urls (2026-03-23)
- ❎CSV—Allow link to other Dokuwiki in Obsidian format (2026-03-23)
- ❎CSV:TO-DO—Allow link to other Dokuwiki in Obsidian format (2026-03-23)
